post.description: Accepts a PKCS#12 (.p12) file and its password. The service parses the certificate metadata, stores the file in S3, and persists the metadata in DynamoDB. The returned `id` should be saved as the `signingCertId` field in the company configuration (PUT /api/company-config) so the service uses this certificate to sign invoices.

file.description: PKCS#12 (.p12) certificate file issued by a trusted CA (e.g. BCE, Security Data, ANF).

password.description: Password that protects the .p12 file. Required to extract the private key.

id.description: Unique certificate identifier. Set this value as the `signingCertId` in the company configuration (PUT /api/company-config).

serialNumber.description: Serial number extracted from the X.509 certificate inside the .p12 file.

subject.description: Distinguished Name (DN) of the certificate subject in RFC 4514 format.

issuer.description: Distinguished Name (DN) of the Certificate Authority that issued this certificate.

validTo.description: Certificate expiry date (ISO 8601). Invoices cannot be signed after this date.

fileName.description: Original filename of the uploaded .p12 file.

s3Url.description: S3 URL where the certificate file is stored.

uploadedAt.description: Timestamp when the certificate was uploaded (ISO 8601).

400.description: Missing file, wrong file extension, or invalid request.

schema.description: Missing file, wrong file extension, or invalid request.

422.description: File could not be parsed — wrong password or corrupted .p12.

schema.description: File could not be parsed — wrong password or corrupted .p12.

get.description: Returns all certificates stored in the system.

id.description: Unique certificate identifier. Set this value as the `signingCertId` in the company configuration (PUT /api/company-config).

serialNumber.description: Serial number extracted from the X.509 certificate inside the .p12 file.

subject.description: Distinguished Name (DN) of the certificate subject in RFC 4514 format.

issuer.description: Distinguished Name (DN) of the Certificate Authority that issued this certificate.

validTo.description: Certificate expiry date (ISO 8601). Invoices cannot be signed after this date.

fileName.description: Original filename of the uploaded .p12 file.

s3Url.description: S3 URL where the certificate file is stored.

uploadedAt.description: Timestamp when the certificate was uploaded (ISO 8601).

get.description: Returns the metadata for a single certificate.

id.description: Unique certificate identifier. Set this value as the `signingCertId` in the company configuration (PUT /api/company-config).

serialNumber.description: Serial number extracted from the X.509 certificate inside the .p12 file.

subject.description: Distinguished Name (DN) of the certificate subject in RFC 4514 format.

issuer.description: Distinguished Name (DN) of the Certificate Authority that issued this certificate.

validTo.description: Certificate expiry date (ISO 8601). Invoices cannot be signed after this date.

fileName.description: Original filename of the uploaded .p12 file.

s3Url.description: S3 URL where the certificate file is stored.

uploadedAt.description: Timestamp when the certificate was uploaded (ISO 8601).

404.description: No certificate found with the given ID.

schema.description: No certificate found with the given ID.

delete.description: Deletes the certificate from both DynamoDB and S3. If this certificate is currently set as the `signingCertId` in company configuration, invoice signing will fail until a new certificate is configured.

404.description: No certificate found with the given ID.

schema.description: No certificate found with the given ID.

put.summary: Create or update the company fiscal configuration
put.description: Upserts the singleton company configuration used when generating invoices. This must be configured before the service can process any `sales.confirmed` Kafka events. The `invoiceSequence` field is optional — if omitted, the current counter is preserved.

accountingRequired.description: Whether the company is obligated to keep accounting records.

invoiceSequence.description: Seed value for the invoice sequence counter. Optional — preserves the existing counter if omitted.

signingCertId.description: UUID of the signing certificate. Use the `id` returned by POST /api/certificates/upload.

name.description: Legal company name as registered with the SRI.

tradeName.description: Commercial or trade name shown on invoices.

mainAddress.description: Main establishment address registered with the SRI.

branchCode.description: Branch code used in invoice numbering (001–999).

salePointCode.description: Point-of-sale code used in invoice numbering (001–999).

specialTaxpayerResolution.description: SRI resolution number if the company is a special taxpayer. Null otherwise.

withholdingAgentResolution.description: SRI resolution number if the company is a withholding agent. Null otherwise.

accountingRequired.description: Whether the company is required to keep accounting records (obligado a llevar contabilidad).

emissionType.description: Emission type. `1` = Normal (currently the only supported value).

invoiceSequence.description: Current sequential invoice counter. Auto-incremented on each invoice creation. Can be seeded on first setup.

signingCertId.description: UUID of the PKCS#12 certificate used to sign invoices. Set this to the `id` returned by the certificate upload endpoint. Null if no certificate has been configured.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last configuration update (ISO 8601).

400.description: Validation error or missing required fields.

schema.description: Validation error or missing required fields.

get.description: Returns the current singleton company configuration.

name.description: Legal company name as registered with the SRI.

tradeName.description: Commercial or trade name shown on invoices.

mainAddress.description: Main establishment address registered with the SRI.

branchCode.description: Branch code used in invoice numbering (001–999).

salePointCode.description: Point-of-sale code used in invoice numbering (001–999).

specialTaxpayerResolution.description: SRI resolution number if the company is a special taxpayer. Null otherwise.

withholdingAgentResolution.description: SRI resolution number if the company is a withholding agent. Null otherwise.

accountingRequired.description: Whether the company is required to keep accounting records (obligado a llevar contabilidad).

emissionType.description: Emission type. `1` = Normal (currently the only supported value).

invoiceSequence.description: Current sequential invoice counter. Auto-incremented on each invoice creation. Can be seeded on first setup.

signingCertId.description: UUID of the PKCS#12 certificate used to sign invoices. Set this to the `id` returned by the certificate upload endpoint. Null if no certificate has been configured.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last configuration update (ISO 8601).

404.description: No company configuration has been saved yet.

schema.description: No company configuration has been saved yet.

get.description: Returns a summary list of all invoices stored in the system, ordered by creation time. The XML body is omitted from list responses for performance.

orderId.description: Identifier of the originating sale order.

accessCode.description: 49-digit SRI access code that uniquely identifies the voucher. Includes emission date, voucher type, RUC, environment, sequence, and a mod-11 check digit.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the invoice.

signatureId.description: ID of the digital certificate used to sign the invoice XML.

statusHistory.description: Ordered list of all status transitions the invoice has gone through.

items.description: A single status transition recorded on the invoice audit trail.

name.description: Status name at the time of the transition.

statusDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the transition occurred.

description.description: Optional message from SRI or internal notes attached to the transition.

get.description: Returns full invoice detail including the signed XML and complete status history.

orderId.description: Identifier of the originating sale order.

accessCode.description: 49-digit SRI access code that uniquely identifies the voucher. Includes emission date, voucher type, RUC, environment, sequence, and a mod-11 check digit.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the invoice.

signatureId.description: ID of the digital certificate used to sign the invoice XML.

statusHistory.description: Ordered list of all status transitions the invoice has gone through.

items.description: A single status transition recorded on the invoice audit trail.

name.description: Status name at the time of the transition.

statusDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the transition occurred.

description.description: Optional message from SRI or internal notes attached to the transition.

xml.description: Full signed invoice XML in SRI format. Present only in the detail endpoint.

404.description: No invoice found with the given ID.

schema.description: No invoice found with the given ID.
